LanguageData.SilverDrop.label: national treasury drop
LanguageData.SilverDrop.description: Call for a drop of 500 gold.
LanguageData.GlitterMedDrop.label: pre-war meds permit
LanguageData.GlitterMedDrop.description: Call for a drop of 5 pre-war medicine.
LanguageData.CallMilitaryAidLarge.label: call marine squad
LanguageData.CallMilitaryAidLarge.description: Call a group of 4 professional marines to aid you in battle.
LanguageData.CallMilitaryAidGrand.label: call secret service squad
LanguageData.CallMilitaryAidGrand.description: Call a group of 4 elite secret service operatives to aid you in battle.
LanguageData.CallOrbitalStrike.label: call orbital strike
LanguageData.CallOrbitalStrike.description: Call a single orbital strike at a target position.
LanguageData.CallOrbitalSalvo.label: call orbital salvo
LanguageData.CallOrbitalSalvo.description: Call a salvo of orbital strikes around a target position.
LanguageData.VFEI_GoldDrop.label: gold drop
LanguageData.VFEI_GoldDrop.description: Call for a drop of 50 gold.
LanguageData.VFEI_PlasteelDrop.label: plasteel drop
LanguageData.VFEI_PlasteelDrop.description: Call for a drop of 55 plasteel.
LanguageData.VFEI_JadeDrop.label: jade drop
LanguageData.VFEI_JadeDrop.description: Call for a drop of 100 jade.
LanguageData.VFEI_UraniumDrop.label: uranium drop
LanguageData.VFEI_UraniumDrop.description: Call for a drop of 80 uranium.
LanguageData.VFEI_ClothDrop.label: cloth drop
LanguageData.VFEI_ClothDrop.description: Call for a drop of 330 cloth.
LanguageData.VFEI_WoodDrop.label: wood drop
LanguageData.VFEI_WoodDrop.description: Call for a drop of 400 wood.
LanguageData.VFEI_SynthreadDrop.label: synthread drop
LanguageData.VFEI_SynthreadDrop.description: Call for a drop of 125 synthread.
LanguageData.VFEI_HerbalMedDrop.label: herbal med drop
LanguageData.VFEI_HerbalMedDrop.description: Call for a drop of 40 herbal medicine.
LanguageData.VFEI_MedDrop.label: med drop
LanguageData.VFEI_MedDrop.description: Call for a drop of 25 medicine.
LanguageData.VFEI_DevilstrandDrop.label: devilstrand drop
LanguageData.VFEI_DevilstrandDrop.description: Call for a drop of 90 devilstrand.
LanguageData.VFEI_HyperweaveDrop.label: hyperweave drop
LanguageData.VFEI_HyperweaveDrop.description: Call for a drop of 55 hyperweave.
LanguageData.VFEI_ChemfuelDrop.label: chemfuel drop
LanguageData.VFEI_ChemfuelDrop.description: Call for a drop of 220 chemfuel.
LanguageData.VFEI_ComponentDrop.label: component drop
LanguageData.VFEI_ComponentDrop.description: Call for a drop of 15 components.
LanguageData.VFEI_ComponentSpacerDrop.label: advanced component drop
LanguageData.VFEI_ComponentSpacerDrop.description: Call for a drop of 3 advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEI_HEShellsDrop.label: shells drop
LanguageData.VFEI_HEShellsDrop.description: Call for a drop of 10 high-explosive shells.
LanguageData.VFEI_NobleFoodDrop.label: official meal drop
LanguageData.VFEI_NobleFoodDrop.description: Call for a drop of 15 lavish meals.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallTrooperPlatoon.label: call Whitespring trooper platoon
LanguageData.VFEI_CallTrooperPlatoon.description: Call a group of 8 Whitespring troopers to aid you in battle.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallJanissaryPlatoon.label: call marine platoon
LanguageData.VFEI_CallJanissaryPlatoon.description: Call a group of 8 professional Whitespring marines to aid you in battle.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallCataphractPlatoon.label: call Secret Service detachment
LanguageData.VFEI_CallCataphractPlatoon.description: Call a group of 8 heavily armored Secret Service agents to aid you in battle.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallLaborerUnion.label: call public works crew
LanguageData.VFEI_CallLaborerUnion.description: Call a group of 12 Whitespring public workers to assist you for 4 days. These workers can only do general labor tasks. You can control them as though they were your own colonists. You are required to keep them safe.
LanguageData.VFEI_StrikerTurretDrop.label: striker drop
LanguageData.VFEI_StrikerTurretDrop.description: Call for a drop of three striker turrets to aid you in battle. After they fire all their ammo, striker turrets self-detonate.
LanguageData.VFEI_BurnoutShieldDrop.label: burnout shield drop
LanguageData.VFEI_BurnoutShieldDrop.description: Call for a drop of a burnout low shield to aid you in battle. It activates where it lands and will last 30 seconds before deactivating.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallEvacShuttle.label: call evac shuttle
LanguageData.VFEI_CallEvacShuttle.description: Call an armed shuttle for your own use. It will transport colonists, items, and animals anywhere you like within 40 world tiles. It will stay in the area only for a brief moment.
LanguageData.VFEI_StoneDrop.label: stone drop
LanguageData.VFEI_StoneDrop.description: Call for a drop of 500 random stone bricks.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallStellicGuards.label: call presidential guard detail
LanguageData.VFEI_CallStellicGuards.description: Call a group of 6 presidential guards, ranged and melee, to aid you in battle.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallImperialRegiment.label: call government strike force
LanguageData.VFEI_CallImperialRegiment.description: Call a government strike force of 10 Whitespring marines and 6 heavily armored Secret Service agents. They arrive in an armed shuttle and cannot be controlled, but will eliminate every threat in the area before departing.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallOrbitalSlicingBeam.label: call orbital slicing beam
LanguageData.VFEI_CallOrbitalSlicingBeam.description: Call an orbital beam from a Whitespring flagship in orbit. The beam will travel in a direction specified by you, burning everything it touches.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallAbsolver.label: call covert operative
LanguageData.VFEI_CallAbsolver.description: Call a Whitespring covert operative to assist you for 4 days. This specialist is a master assassin and will not perform any tasks other than killing. You can control them as though they were one of your own colonists. If the operative dies, a replacement will arrive immediately and inherit the remaining contract time.
LanguageData.VFEI_CallTechfriar.label: call scientist
LanguageData.VFEI_CallTechfriar.description: Call a Whitespring scientist to assist you for 4 days. This specialist can only perform research-related tasks. You can control them as though they were one of your own colonists. You are required to keep them safe.
